title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Vision Express India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Vision Express India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Vision Express India family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Kolkata. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Vision Express India:
Vision Express India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vision Express India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
